arts.ttl: Glazers move further out of Man Utd
arts.sum: It's thought that his United stake is now 28.94 per cent with the £79million injection, though this can't be used in the January window, according to the Daily Mail. Ratcliffe paid around £1.2bn for 27.7 per cent of the club earlier this year.

arts.ttl: The pros and cons of selling Marcus Rashford
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford's time at Man Utd might be coming to an end, or maybe not? New Man Utd head coach Ruben Amorim amplified the noise when he left Rashford out of the matchday squad to face Man City, though he insists it was not a disciplinary measure but rather a motivational one.

arts.ttl: Jose Mourinho asks for signing from Tottenham – Spurs have easy decision to make for January
arts.sum: Fenerbahce could offer Tottenham Hotspur’s Sergio Reguilon an escape route in the winter market. That’s according to AS, who state Jose Mourinho has asked the Turkish club to sign the 28-year-old or AS Roma’s Mario Hermoso. arts.ttl: Rene Hake backed for his first job post Manchester United exit – United may need to agree first
arts.sum: Former Manchester United assistant manager René Hake would be a good successor to Hedwiges Maduro at Almere City. That’s according to Voetbal International journalist Chris Templeman, via FC Update, who believes Hake should be handed the role after Maduro was sacked this week.
